profile.en: System administrator with hands-on experience in Linux server management, cloud infrastructure (GCP, Cloudflare), and Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform). Built containerized deployments, CI/CD pipelines, and AI-Ops orchestration systems. CCNA and Google Cloud certified.
profile.id: Administrator sistem dengan pengalaman praktis dalam manajemen server Linux, infrastruktur cloud (GCP, Cloudflare), dan Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform). Membangun deployment terkontainerisasi, pipeline CI/CD, dan sistem orkestrasi AI-Ops. Bersertifikat CCNA dan Google Cloud.

experience.title: Principal System Architect
experience.description: Technology research and system development entity focusing on AI-driven automation, cloud infrastructure, and digital sovereignty.
responsibilities: Designed multi-cloud infrastructure architecture across GCP, Azure, and Cloudflare using Terraform IaC
Provisioned 8 DNS zones and Cloudflare Zero Trust access organization via Terraform
Deployed containerized services on resource-constrained environments (GCP e2-micro, 1GB RAM) with memory limits as low as 50MB
Built AI agent orchestration systems using n8n, Ollama, and Arize Phoenix for local LLM workflow management
Established CI/CD pipelines with 36+ GitHub Actions workflows across 17 repositories

experience.title: Cloud Computing Trainee
experience.description: Cloud Computing learning path led by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek, and Traveloka.
responsibilities: Completed Cloud Computing training with competency certificate in Specializing Cloud Computing and Architecting with Google Compute Engine
Created capstone project 'Kalpataru' — a community waste reduction application deployed on Google Cloud Platform

experience.title: Junior System Administrator
experience.description: Managed Linux server infrastructure within a Proxmox VE virtualization environment.
responsibilities: Managed Linux server infrastructure in Proxmox VE environment, ensuring uptime and security for academic systems
Configured server security, monitored performance, and performed rapid troubleshooting to minimize downtime
Supported web application deployments and managed backup and recovery procedures

experience.title: Laboratory Assistant Captain
experience.description: Led laboratory assistant team for Informatics Laboratory Infotech at University of Muhammadiyah Malang.
responsibilities: Conducted practicum activities following Standardization of Practical Assessment Modules and Indicators
Entrusted as Laboratory Assistant Captain for the Class of 2019
Contributed to laboratory structure development at Informatics Laboratory Infotech

experience.title: Learning Facilitator
experience.description: Designed and delivered technical training for new members.
responsibilities: Designed and delivered technical training on Cyber Security fundamentals and Linux operating system
Developed structured learning modules and provided one-on-one mentorship

experience.title: Research Staff
experience.description: Contributed to practicum system development and research.
responsibilities: Developed and tested the practicum system
Contributed to UI/UX development in MiLab project for practicum system digitization
Designed network topology using MikroTik in the laboratory area

experience.title: Information System Staff
responsibilities: Contributed to development of SIMPONIA — Publication System for Informatics Student Work

experience.title: AI Engineer Trainee
experience.description: AI engineering training program by Microsoft.
responsibilities: Completed AI engineering training modules

experience.title: Digital Talent Trainee
experience.description: Digital talent scholarship program by Indonesian Ministry of Communication and Information Technology.
responsibilities: Completed digital talent training program

experience.title: Front-End Web Developer Trainee
experience.description: Intensive training program by Ministry of Tourism and Creative Economy.
responsibilities: Completed training in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+)
Developed interactive web application as final capstone project

experience.title: Android Programming Trainee

Developed and submitted functional Android application as final assignment

certifications.name: CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials

projects.name: PES Infrastructure
projects.description: Full Terraform infrastructure managing 8 DNS zones, Cloudflare Zero Trust organization, Azure edge VM with WireGuard, GCP production engine, and Cloudflare Gateway.

projects.name: PES Production Engine
projects.description: Production automation engine running on GCP e2-micro (1GB RAM) with containerized n8n, Dagu workflow orchestration, and Rust-based AI agent — optimized for extreme resource constraints.

projects.name: Zero Trust Network
projects.description: Identity-centric network architecture with Cloudflare Tunnels, WireGuard mesh encryption, Tailscale identity-based access, and Vaultwarden secret management.

projects.name: AI Governance Orchestrator
projects.description: Multi-node Zero-Trust AI architecture managing private LLM workflows via OpenClaw, Ollama, and Arize Phoenix with observability and audit trails.

projects.name: Sovereign Cloud Fabric
projects.description: Multi-cloud infrastructure abstraction ensuring control plane independence from any single provider across Azure, GCP, and AWS.

projects.name: bp-cortex
projects.description: Client/server architecture with Cloudflare Workers, Durable Objects, SST infrastructure, and 34 GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows.
